scripts.dev: concurrently "cd client && npm run dev" "cd server && npm run dev" "cd Project-Clipper/DigiClipper && ..\..\scripts\python.exe server.py" "scripts\python.exe server/pov/app.py"
scripts.test:e2e: node tests/setup/cleanDb.js && cross-env NODE_ENV=test playwright test tests/e2e
scripts.test:e2e:ui: node tests/setup/cleanDb.js && cross-env NODE_ENV=test playwright test tests/e2e --ui
scripts.test:e2e:debug: node tests/setup/cleanDb.js && cross-env NODE_ENV=test playwright test tests/e2e --debug
